metadata.work_description: LUCS for Joint Permit Application.The proposed project is a geotechnical investigation that will evaluate subsurface conditions at the Port of Portland¿s Terminal 6 Berth 601 for design and construction of proposed improvements to the existing facility. Berth 601 is a floating auto carrier dock on the northwest part of Terminal 6 (see Figure 1). Prior to commencing design for the project, a geotechnical investigation is necessary to evaluate subsurface conditions which will support the design of the proposed improvements. The geotechnical investigation will consist of one geotechnical exploration completed from a truck mounted drill rig operated from a spudded barge over the Columbia River in Portland.
